commit_scope: Record the first live Android active mic, camera, and GPU witness receipt after installing the Form-native active sample carrier.

commands: coord join && coord claim "android live active sample receipt"
adb shell input tap 720 1458 && adb shell input text 'http://192.168.0.7:8800'

curl -sS --max-time 2 http://localhost:8800/state | jq '{frames, present, latest: {mic_rms: .latest.mic_rms, camera_luma: .latest.camera_luma, camera_samples: .latest.camera_samples, gpu_pixel: .latest.gpu_pixel, gpu_samples: .latest.gpu_samples, gpu_latency_ms: .latest.gpu_latency_ms, sample_count: .latest.body_state.sample_count, organs_active: .latest.organs_active}, checks, challenger: .challenger, chal_agree, chal_checks}'
local_validation.notes: The current debug APK installed successfully on SM-S918U1 Android 16 arm64-v8a. Runtime permissions for CAMERA and RECORD_AUDIO were granted. The phone was unlocked and adb-visible. mDNS discovery did not resolve the Mac witness, so the witness URL was entered manually as http://192.168.0.7:8800. The Mac witness then reported present=true, frames=141, nonzero mic_rms=0.007045886313547694, nonzero camera_luma=0.02805499733188006, camera_samples=2367, gpu_pixel=-13614897, gpu_samples=99, gpu_latency_ms=1.412917, body_state.sample_count=5084, checks=136, chal_agree=138, chal_checks=138, and active organs including accelerometer, camera, gps, gpu, gyroscope, light, magnetometer, mic, network, and screen. The existing Python receipt helper wrote capability/liveness JSON to .cache/android-mesh-learning/latest.json, but it does not yet export live witness counters; this slice records the live counter proof in durable docs/evidence and leaves Form-native witness-state export as the next receipt-export gap.

deploy_validation.summary: No deploy requested for this proof-only slice.

phase_gate.gate: The active mic/camera/GPU sample carrier must be witnessed on a real unlocked Android phone before speech, vision, and multimodal lanes treat active physical samples as established.
phase_gate.next: Build a Form-native witness-state receipt exporter, then feed active summaries into heldout speech, vision, and multimodal learners; extend GPU from EGL readback summaries to Vulkan/NNAPI parity receipts.
